# Matan Shabi – DevOps & Cloud Security Engineer

> Portfolio of Matan Shabi (מתן שאבי), a DevOps & Cloud-Security engineer based in Israel. Specializes in AWS, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Terraform, and DevSecOps. Available for DevOps and DevSecOps positions.

## Main Content

- [Portfolio Home](https://matan-shabi.com): Full portfolio including experience, skills, projects, and contact information.

## About

Matan Shabi is a detail-oriented DevOps Engineer with a strong foundation in cloud technologies (AWS), CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions), and container orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes). Skilled in Python, Java, and infrastructure automation. Holds experience in cloud security and DevSecOps practices.

## Experience

Current and recent roles include DevOps Engineer positions focusing on secure cloud infrastructure, automated deployment pipelines, and platform engineering. Former Vice Chairman of the Kinneret Student Association (2022–2025), managing a team of 30 and a 1M NIS budget.

## Technical Skills

- Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, EKS, IAM, CloudFront, Amplify)
- Containers: Docker, Kubernetes
- CI/CD: Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI
- IaC: Terraform, AWS CDK
- Security: DevSecOps, Pen-testing, Cybersecurity
- Languages: Python, Java, Bash
- Monitoring: Datadog, Grafana
- Artifacts: JFrog Artifactory

## Projects

- [WorldOfGame](https://github.com/Matan-Shabi/WorldOfGame): Python-based mini-games platform with full CI/CD pipeline, Docker, and Selenium testing.
- Essentia User Management System: Modular admin panel with role-based permissions using Next.js and Express.js.
- Mulligan Parking System: Distributed parking management with RabbitMQ, MongoDB, and AI recommendations.
